series_metadata.series_description: Transient material includes all communications by LSC staff conveying information of temporary importance made in lieu of oral communication including telephone, voicemail, instant and text messages, social media posts maintained on the social media website, and shared calendars.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value, then destroy., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Wastepaper
